data.content: Plan review did not approve the current implementation plan. The main design issue is that the plan does not preserve the legacy 'remote' output value that still exists in profile-level compatibility mode via OutputMode::Remote and related tests, so the alias/normalization strategy must include that path. The second issue is architectural: prompt rendering in execution paths is currently served from pre-rendered profile.action_prompts and then read through action_prompt::render_for_profile/poll_claim::prompt_body_for_state, so the plan must explicitly change the runtime rendering/data-flow to consume resolved StepMetadata.output instead of only updating build_prompt_params/render_prompt_body helpers. After revising those two areas, the rest of the proposed coverage and parser-validation work looks directionally sound.
